items.description: The first trailer for Evil Dead Burn has given audiences a new look at the Necronomicon, and it could change the franchise forever.

items.title: The iPhone Face Odyssey
items.description: Tom Holland and Zendaya are going to have SUCH a huge summer because they are in the two movies expected to be among the biggest, if not THE biggest, movies of the season. Of course, there is Spider-Man: Brand New Day, but there is also The Odyssey, Christoph…
